meta.title: Catch the Attention — Saga for Creators Vol. 2 | Isabella Lizarralde
meta.description: Turn your identity into a clear message, a profile that converts, and a sustainable content system. The ebook that puts what you already are into motion.

hero.headline: Identity without a message is dormant potential. It's time for the world to know.
hero.subhead: Turn who you already are into a digital presence that speaks for you before you open your mouth — with a clear message, a profile that converts, and a content system that holds up week after week.
hero.cta: I want to build my presence
hero.ctaMicrocopy: Instant access · Secure payment · No subscription

problem.title: You already feel you have something important to say. The problem is nobody knows it yet.

cards.title: Your profile doesn't turn visits into followers
cards.body: Someone lands, reads your bio... and leaves. Not because they don't care — but because in 3 seconds they don't understand who you are, what you do, or what they gain by staying.

cards.title: You record without structure and depend on inspiration
cards.body: Without a script or system, every video depends on having the right words that day. Sometimes you do. Usually you don't. And that uncertainty drains you.

cards.title: You watch the wrong numbers and don't understand what works
cards.body: You count followers and likes. But the metrics that actually build — retention, saves, shares — you're not even tracking. So you don't know what to improve.

cards.title: No system: you post on impulse or you don't post at all
cards.body: Some days you upload three things. Other weeks you disappear. Without a weekly ritual, consistency depends on mood. And mood isn't a strategy.

solution.title: By the end of this ebook, you'll post with intention. Not to see what happens — so something specific happens.

titleHighlight.before: By the end of this ebook, you'll post with
titleHighlight.after: . Not to see what happens — so something specific happens.

solution.giftHint: Includes a hooks bank, weekly planning, and brand outreach guide.

outcomes.title: Write your Mission Statement and value proposition
outcomes.body: The two lines that turn a generic profile into a brand understood in 10 seconds — with a template and examples for 5 different niches.

outcomes.title: Optimize your profile to turn visits into followers
outcomes.body: The 4-line bio, the photo, and the highlights: each element with a strategic purpose so your first digital impression works for you.

outcomes.title: Master the Hook–Context–Value–CTA structure
outcomes.body: The creative and technical script so every video holds attention from the first 3 seconds — without depending on having the right words that day.

outcomes.title: Build your weekly production system
outcomes.body: The calendar, the 3 idea sources, and the Create–Optimize–Connect ritual to post consistently without burning out in the process.

solution.imageAlt: Isabella — method applied in real content

proof.headline: I built it for myself first. When I saw it worked, I turned it into a system for you.
proof.intro: I had the exact moment when my profile stopped being noise and started being a proposition. It wasn't a viral video — it was the day I understood that message clarity does more than posting frequency. This ebook is that learning, organized.

bullets: Posting without pillars or a clear message
Mix of trends without my own narrative
Couldn't explain my proposition in one sentence
Early versions of Mission Statement and pillars
More focus on who my real audience was
Scripts and formats with clear intent
Set and lighting that raised perception
My profile started closing its own story
Content recognizable instantly — consistent style and message
The system in this ebook already works for other creators

hero.statement: It's not just an ebook. It's the full system to go from posting without direction to having a clear message, a profile that converts, and a week of content produced with intention.

lineItems.label: Editable Canva portfolio template (intro, services, videos, contact)
Bank of 50+ ready-to-use hooks — real, not generic
Mini guide “How to message a brand” (DM + email)

bonuses.painHeadline: You don't know where to start your portfolio
bonuses.outcomeBenefit: Pre-built Canva structure: intro, services, videos, and contact — so brands understand your proposition before they message you.

bonuses.painHeadline: You go blank when you open the camera
bonuses.outcomeBenefit: 50+ real hooks ready to use today — the first 3 seconds that retain, organized by content type and goal.

bonuses.painHeadline: You post without a plan or clear goal
bonuses.outcomeBenefit: Template with days, formats, pillars, and goal per piece — in Notion and PDF — so your content week exists before it starts.

bonuses.painHeadline: You don't know how to approach brands professionally
bonuses.outcomeBenefit: Mini guide with a DM example, email example, and what to say — and what to avoid — so the first impression opens doors, not closes them.

urgency.title: Every week you post without a system is effort that doesn't build.
bullets: No fake inventory or artificial counters. The real cost is keeping on posting without a clear message, without a profile that converts, without knowing which metrics matter.
Launch bonuses are available in this opening window. When the period closes, the price goes up and the bonuses are removed from the bundle.

offer.ctaPrimary: Yes, I want my access now
offer.guaranteeHint: Refund policy available at checkout before paying.
offer.ctaMicrocopy: Instant access · Secure payment · No subscription

faq.introBody: Before something stops you, here are the most common doubts.

items.q: Do I need to have read Vol. 1 to get the most from this ebook?
items.a: It's not required, but this volume assumes you already have a sense of who you are as a creator. If that's still unclear, Vol. 1 is the first step. If you already have identity defined — even intuitively — this ebook takes you to the next level.

items.q: Is it for me if I've been posting for a while without results?
items.a: Especially for you. Most creators who post without results don't have a quantity problem — they have a structure problem: undefined message, profile that doesn't convert, content without a script. This ebook targets exactly that.

items.q: Do I need expensive gear or a professional studio?
items.a: No. The ebook includes a full chapter on production with what you have: natural lighting, CapCut as your editing tool, and how to set up a corner of your home. Quality isn't hardware — it's intention.

items.q: Does it work for TikTok, Instagram, or both?
items.a: Both. There's a chapter on platform strategy that explains algorithm differences, what content works on each, and how to adapt the same material without just copy-pasting.
It's a PDF designed to read and work through. It has 13 chapters with practical exercises at the end of each — so you don't only read, you apply and build your system as you go.

Refund policy applies per the payment platform — you can review it before buying at checkout. What I do promise is that the content is the same system I built for myself: not theory, but real structure that's been tested.

close.headline: You're no longer posting to see what happens. You're posting with intention, with a system, and with clarity about why.
close.body: That's what this ebook gives you. No more posting blind, no more depending on inspiration, no more watching numbers that tell you nothing. Just a clear message, a system that holds up, and a presence that works for you.
close.footnote: Consistency isn't talent. It's a system that works even on days you don't feel like it.

transitions.problemToSolution: What if you had a system that solves this once and for all?
transitions.proofToOffer: That system exists. And it is available for you now.

exitIntent.headline: Before you go...
exitIntent.body: Publishing with a system means publishing with intention. This ebook gives you exactly that.
